name: PAY_VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVELS_VL
query: SELECT PAY_VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVELS_F.VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVEL_ID, PAY_VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVELS_F.VO_NAME, PAY_VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVELS_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, PAY_VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVELS_F.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, PAY_VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVELS_F.VALUE_DEFN_ID, PAY_VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVELS_F.CRITERIA_LEVEL, PAY_VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVELS_F.DATABASE_ITEM_ID, PAY_VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVELS_F.ENTERPRISE_ID, PAY_VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVELS_F.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, PAY_VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVELS_F.LEGISLATION_CODE, PAY_VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVELS_TL.LABEL, PAY_VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVELS_F.SEED_STATUS FROM PAY_VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVELS_F, PAY_VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVELS_TL WHERE PAY_VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVELS_F.VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVEL_ID = PAY_VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVELS_TL.VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVEL_ID AND PAY_VALUE_CRITERIA_LEVELS_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
